# services.pretix

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.pretix`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.pretix.celery.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to celery. See <https://docs.celeryq.dev/en/stable/reference/cli.html#celery-worker> for more info. |
| `services.pretix.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically set up the database on the local DBMS instance. Only supported for PostgreSQL. Not required for sqlite. |
| `services.pretix.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Pretix, a ticket shop application for conferences, festivals, concerts, etc. |
| `services.pretix.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file to pass secret configuration values. Each line must follow the `PRETIX_SECTION_KEY=value` pattern. |
| `services.pretix.group` | `string` | Group under which pretix should run. |
| `services.pretix.gunicorn.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to gunicorn. See <https://docs.pretix.eu/en/latest/admin/installation/manual_smallscale.html#start-pretix-as-a-service> for details. |
| `services.pretix.nginx.domain` | `string` | The domain name under which to set up the virtual host. |
| `services.pretix.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to set up an nginx virtual host. |
| `services.pretix.package` | `package` | The pretix package to use. |
| `services.pretix.plugins` | `list of package` | Pretix plugins to install into the Python environment. |
| `services.pretix.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | pretix configuration as a Nix attribute set. All settings can also be passed from the environment. See <https://docs.pretix.eu/en/latest/admin/config.html> for possible options. |
| `services.pretix.settings.celery.backend` | `string` | URI to the celery backend used for the asynchronous job queue. |
| `services.pretix.settings.celery.broker` | `string` | URI to the celery broker used for the asynchronous job queue. |
| `services.pretix.settings.database.backend` | `one of "sqlite3", "postgresql"` | Database backend to use. Only postgresql is recommended for production setups. |
| `services.pretix.settings.database.host` | `null or string` | Database host or socket path. |
| `services.pretix.settings.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.pretix.settings.database.user` | `string` | Database username. |
| `services.pretix.settings.mail.from` | `string` | E-Mail address used in the `FROM` header of outgoing mails. |
| `services.pretix.settings.mail.host` | `string` | Hostname of the SMTP server use for mail delivery. |
| `services.pretix.settings.mail.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the SMTP server to use for mail delivery. |
| `services.pretix.settings.memcached.location` | `null or string` | The `host:port` combination or the path to the UNIX socket of a memcached instance. Can be used instead of Redis for caching. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.cachedir` | `absolute path` | Directory for storing temporary files. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.currency` | `string` | Default currency for events in its ISO 4217 three-letter code. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.datadir` | `absolute path` | Directory for storing user uploads and similar data. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.instance_name` | `string` | The name of this installation. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.logdir` | `absolute path` | Directory for storing log files. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.registration` | `boolean` | Whether to allow registration of new admin users. |
| `services.pretix.settings.pretix.url` | `string` | The installationŌĆÖs full URL, without a trailing slash. |
| `services.pretix.settings.redis.location` | `null or string` | URI to the redis server, used to speed up locking, caching and session storage. |
| `services.pretix.settings.redis.sessions` | `boolean` | Whether to use redis as the session storage. |
| `services.pretix.settings.tools.pdftk` | `absolute path` | Path to the pdftk executable. |
| `services.pretix.user` | `string` | User under which pretix should run. |
